title: FMD - Using Play Button when only one earbud is connected
scenario: Find My Device tone plays on the correct connected earbud when only one earbud is paired
steps: 1. Open Poly Studio Mobile app on the Home screen.
2. Pair both earbuds to the device via Bluetooth.
3. Confirm both earbuds appear as connected in the app's Device Settings screen.
4. Disconnect one earbud (e.g., left earbud) by placing it in the charging case or turning it off.
5. Navigate to Poly Studio Mobile → [Device Name] → Find My Device.
6. Tap the Play button next to the remaining connected earbud (e.g., right earbud).
7. Observe the app screen for the 'Sending tone...' message, an animated stop button, and an illustration.
8. Verify that the tone plays from the connected earbud only (not from the disconnected earbud).
10. Verify that the tone stops and the button returns to the Play state.
12. Disconnect the other earbud (e.g., right earbud) by placing it in the charging case or turning it off.
13. Repeat steps 6–10 for the now-connected earbud (e.g., left earbud).
expected: The tone plays only from the connected earbud. The app displays the "Sending tone..." message with an animated stop button and illustration. Tapping the stop button stops the tone and returns the button to the Play state. This behavior is consistent regardless of which earbud is disconnected.
